title: gomphandra quadrifida var. angustifolia
intro: Gomphandra quadrifida var. angustifolia, also known as Narrow-leaved Gomphandra, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Stemonuraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Gomphandra quadrifida var. angustifolia include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, and its leaves can also be made into capsules or extracts for convenient consumption.
